title: CDU Holiday Pack
description: Welcome to a Winter Winterland! Adventure through a wintery holiday questline for CDU's 2024 holiday event! Make gingerbread, have snowball fights, and get gifts for staff members!
body:
Welcome to a Winter Winterland! Adventure through a wintery holiday questline for CDU's 2024 holiday event! Make gingerbread, have snowball fights, and get gifts for staff members!

With many winter-themed mods and resourcepacks, this pack is sure to bring you lots of fun this holiday season! Alongside this, we have a unique, custom-built questline for the event!

Want to join the community? Heres our discord: [https://discord.gg/playcdu](https://discord.gg/playcdu)
